title: Speed Up
overview: Mashumairesh!! is back and heading to Shibu Valley to try and play at the Midi City Worldwide Love Rock Festival, but they run into some trouble on the way.

title: Final Opinion
overview: The girls of Mashumairesh!! are put on trial for their alleged role in the destruction of Midi City. Will they be able to prove their innocence?

title: Do! It! Happy Adventure!
overview: Plasmagica welcomes Mashumairesh!! and shows them around Shibu Valley before letting them explore on their own. But when left to their own devices...

title: We're Crimson I'm Joker (Etc.) and Obento Magnum
overview: DOKONJOFINGER and SHINGANCRIMSONZ participate in an excavation to find treasure and earn money, but they find themselves in trouble during the dig.

title: Sq-Sq-Squeeze Heart Shaker and Ain't Nobody Stop
overview: Mashumairesh!! goes to watch Criticrista play on the popular music show, Music Terminal, and they run into REIJINGSIGNAL, who are also playing that day.

title: Maiden Mirage
overview: In order to take their singing to the next level, Mashumairesh!! attends a workshop by Tsurezurenaru Ayatsuri Mugenan, but the workshop doesn't feel very much like a workshop...

title: Pass Stage
overview: In order to gain experience to get to the festival, DOKONJOFINGER plays in a battle of the bands against ARCAREAFACT, but Sojun's been acting strange...

title: Runners High!!
overview: Maple found a venue for the Plasmagica and Mashumairesh!! concert, but Delmin suddenly needs to return home...

title: EMPIRE DOMINATOR
overview: Along with the other girl bands from Banded Rocking Records, Mashmairesh!! gets a chance to appear in a sports festival with REIJINGSIGNAL and BVL.

title: You Are My Princess
overview: As the bands start getting ready for the Midi City Worldwide Love Rock Festival, DOKONJOFINGER and Plasmagica go watch a Trichronika concert.

title: Starry Sky Light Story
overview: It's the last spurt before the Midi City Worldwide Love Rock Festival, and Mashumairesh!! and Plasmagica think back on how they formed their bands as they make their final preparations.

title: Anokanatarium
overview: The bands are all excited and nervous as the Midi City Worldwide Love Rock Festival begins, but just as Mashumairesh!! starts to play...
